description: Israeli periphery tax discount per ITA Section 11 (סעיף 11 לפקודת מס הכנסה).
source: הודעת מס הכנסה (רשימת יישובים מוטבים) — annual notice per סעיף 11(ב)(2)
model_description: Each eligible settlement has a year-specific (rate_pct, ceiling) pair set by the Director of the Tax Authority. Discount = min(personal_effort_income, ceiling) × rate_pct. Rates range 7%-20%; ceilings range ₪146,640-₪267,840 (2025). NOT credit-points, NOT a flat tier system.
model_change_note: Pre-2026-05-04 schema used a fabricated tier1=13%/tier2=11% model. That model never matched the statute. All consumers (lib/calculateTax.ts, lib/optimizer.ts, lib/pdfUtils.ts) updated.
pre_2024_handling: Years 2020-2023 had different lists and a partially different mechanism (per צו פיתוח אזור). Wikisource publishes 2024-2026 lists only. The engine returns 0 discount for those years — conservative no-claim. To file pre-2024 claims, a manual ingest of the relevant year's notice is required.
_postcodes_meta: Postcode→settlement mapping is intentionally small. Only postcodes that resolve to a settlement actually present in the statute years are included. Pre-2026-05-04 list contained 22 false-positive center-city postcodes (Netanya/Holon/Rishon LeZion/Raanana/Kfar Saba/Rehovot/Hadera/Ashdod/Be'er Sheva/Eilat/Jerusalem/Ma'aleh Adumim/Lod/Ramla/Or Yehuda/Gedera/Kiryat Malachi/Ashkelon/Naharia/Migdal HaEmek/Afula/Haifa) which produced illegal over-refunds. Removed.
